title: Assertion fault:  Text encoding mismatch on value comparison
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id UInt32, username String, email String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE comments (id UInt32, user_id UInt32, comment String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO comments (user_id, comment) VALUES (1, 'This is a comment');
SELECT * FROM users WHERE lower(username) = lower('TESTuser');
key_bug_features: Text encoding mismatch on value comparison
